query: We want to let our customers 'ask questions' about their sales dashboard in plain English and get a chart back. Looking at luzmo-iq-embed-chat in our React app — what auth and dataset scoping do I need?
IQ keeps picking the wrong dataset for finance questions. Token has access to 47 datasets across marketing, sales, finance, HR. How do I narrow it down?
Our PMs say IQ doesn't understand 'AOV' as a column name — it returns nonsense. What's the recommended way to expose business metrics to IQ?
Want to plug Luzmo IQ into our internal Claude agent as a tool. Where's the IQMessage tool/function definition I'd register?
luzmo-iq-embed-answer takes a messages prop — what's the shape of an IQMessage exactly?
Trying to use the IQ components in our React Native mobile app and they just won't load.
Getting an IQ license error in the console. Is IQ a separate add-on we need to enable?
IQ formats our `mrr_eur` column as a plain integer in answers — no currency formatting. How do I fix that?
Server-side IQConversation call — want to drive the conversation programmatically from our backend rather than embedding a chat component.
Want IQ to know that `MRR` means 'Monthly Recurring Revenue normalized monthly' for our finance dataset. Where do I add that context?
How do I embed a normal (non-AI) Luzmo dashboard in a Vue app?
Multi-tenant SaaS, each customer must only see their data. Pattern 1 or Pattern 2?
Push a 50k-row XLSX into a Luzmo dataset using @luzmo/nodejs-sdk.
Customize the appearance of our embedded dashboards — brand colors and dark theme.
How do I let users build their own charts using ACK?
Python script that searches for all dashboards owned by a user and deletes them with confirmation.
Flex line chart renders with no axis labels — what slot config am I missing?
401 Unauthorized from createAuthorization. Env vars look right.
Charts on the same page swap data sometimes — feels like a contextId conflict.
Connect a Salesforce account so our Luzmo dashboards can query opportunities.
